summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phase 3 features: Feed format (1080x1080), og:image meta tags, keyboard shortcuts (L/D/A/S/F), and expandable Appendix with search/filter/pagination. All 50+ test cases passed successfully. All previous phase-1 and phase-2 features verified working correctly.
passed_tests: Toolbar has 3 view links (view-full, view-story, view-feed) with correct data-testids
Navigation to /feed route works correctly
Feed page renders feed-card at native 1080x1080 with all required elements (title, 60.4% hero, split bar, ≈35% callout, @wearelcv footer)
Keyboard shortcut 'L' toggles language between EN and FR
Keyboard shortcut 'F' navigates to /feed
Keyboard shortcut 'S' navigates to /story
Keyboard shortcut 'A' navigates to home
Keyboard shortcut 'D' triggers download (with expected CORS warnings for external fonts)
Keyboard shortcuts correctly disabled when focus is in input/textarea/select/contentEditable elements
Keyboard shortcuts correctly disabled when meta/ctrl/alt keys are held
og:title meta tag contains 'The Booking Gap — Pride Toronto 2025'
og:description meta tag exists
og:type meta tag = 'article'
og:image meta tag points to /og-image.svg
twitter:card meta tag = 'summary_large_image'
twitter:image meta tag points to /og-image.svg
/og-image.svg is accessible (200 OK, 3408 bytes, image/svg+xml)
Appendix section exists at bottom of / page with kicker '07 — APPENDIX' (EN) / '07 — ANNEXE' (FR)
Appendix toggle button works (expand/collapse)
Appendix search functionality works (searched 'adore', found Adore Delano)
Appendix identity filter works (filtered by Trans, found 45 results)
Appendix ethnicity filter works (filtered by Indigenous, found 16 results)
Appendix load-more pagination works (adds 50 rows per click)
Appendix shows correct count: 'Showing X of Y'
Appendix table has 421 performer rows with proper data-testid='appendix-row-{id}'
Language toggle works in French: appendix headers become Nom, Discipline, Identité, Ethnicité, Pays, Scène
Feed card bilingual support works (EN: 'WERE GAY MEN', FR: 'ÉTAIENT DES HOMMES GAIS')
Mobile responsive at 390x844: toolbar wraps gracefully
Mobile responsive: appendix controls stack vertically (flex-direction: column)
Mobile responsive: table has horizontal scroll
Hero stat shows 60.4% (phase-1 feature still working)
Split bar present with correct segments (phase-1 feature still working)
Identity breakdown has 6 rows (phase-1 feature still working)
Ethnicity section present with white/BIPOC split (phase-1 feature still working)
White gay men callout shows ≈35% (phase-1 feature still working)
Methodology section present with 3 cards A, B, C (phase-2 feature still working)
Mission section present as section 06 (phase-2 feature still working)
Contact bar present with Instagram, Facebook, Email links (phase-2 feature still working)
Disclaimer present (phase-2 feature still working)
No JavaScript console errors on page load
No error elements found on page
